THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LEVINSON REVOCABLE TRUST RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, MARIA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 3116-16TH ST. #26, S.F. CA., A WRIT OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES WILL BE ISSUED IMMEDIATELY, BUT DEFT. WILL NOT BE PHYSICALLY EVICTED UNTIL AFTER 7/31/99, IF DEFT. RETURNS ALL KEYS INCLUDING, BUT NOT LIMITED TO, THE BUILDINGS FRONT DOOR KEYS, PLTF. SHALL PAY DEFT. $50, SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH. NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
